likely_primary_repo.name: headyos-core
likely_primary_repo.reason: This repository is identified as the primary monorepo because it is described as 'Heady™ Operating System — the latent OS powering continuous AI reasoning.' All other core repositories explicitly state they are 'Projected from the Heady Latent OS,' indicating that headyos-core is the foundational system from which all other components derive. This makes it the central monorepo/codebase for the entire Heady ecosystem.

notes: Account owner: Eric Haywood (HeadyMe), associated with HeadySystems Inc. The account has 13 public repositories total. Most repositories are written in JavaScript with some using additional languages. Only one repository (Heady-pre-production-9f2f0642) shows visible star count (1 star). The repository structure follows a clear pattern with '-core' suffixed repositories representing the core modules of the Heady AI platform, '-production' repositories for live deployment targets, and 'heady-docs' for documentation. All repositories were recently updated (within the last 16-17 hours as of March 7, 2026).
